body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `package.json:209`
`"apiRefLink": "https://learn.microsoft.com/javascript/api/@azure/arm-resources-subscriptions?view=azure-node-preview"`

The `apiRefLink` uses `?view=azure-node-preview` but this is a **stable** release (`3.0.0`). The preview view should not be used for stable packages.

**Fix:** Update the link to remove the `?view=azure-node-preview` suffix (or use `?view=azure-node-latest`), and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:27`

The previously released version `2.1.1 (2025-08-22)` is missing from the changelog history. The version history jumps directly from `3.0.0` to `2.1.0 (2023-05-24)`, silently dropping `2.1.1` which was already shipped to customers.

**Fix:** Restore the `2.1.1` entry in `CHANGELOG.md` and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:71`
```
**features**
```
The `### Features Added` section heading under `## 2.0.1 (2022-04-18)` was corrupted to `**features**` (bold text instead of an H3 Markdown heading). This is a generation tool bug corrupting existing changelog history.

**Fix:** Restore the line to `### Features Added` and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Design Concern** — `review/arm-resources-subscriptions-node.api.md:35`
```ts
export type AzureSupportedClouds = `${AzureClouds}`;
```
`AzureSupportedClouds` is defined as a closed template literal type derived from the `AzureClouds` enum, making it equivalent to `"AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD" | "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD" | "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"`. This prevents users from passing custom cloud endpoint values not present in the enum.

**Fix:** Change the type to `string` to allow extensibility, matching the Azure SDK pattern for extensible string enums. Update in the TypeSpec spec and trigger SDK regeneration.

🔴 **Design Concern** — `review/arm-resources-subscriptions-node.api.md:28–31`
```ts
export enum AzureClouds {
    AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD = "AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD",
    AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD = "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD",
    AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT = "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"
}
```
Enum members use `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` instead of idiomatic TypeScript `PascalCase` (e.g., `AzureChinaCloud`, `AzurePublicCloud`, `AzureUsGovernment`). The enum is also missing the `Known` prefix — the Azure SDK pattern uses `KnownXxx` for the concrete enum and `Xxx` (= `string`) as the extensible alias.

**Fix:** Add `@clientName` decorators in the TypeSpec spec to rename the enum and its members to PascalCase, then trigger SDK regeneration.

This PR regenerates `@azure/arm-resources-subscriptions` from the new TypeSpec-based generation toolchain (v3.0.0, stable). The review found **2 tool issues** and **2 design concerns** in the public API surface.
